positive: A sophisticated, stylized depiction of a nocturnal cityscape viewed from a high vantage point. The central subject is a stylized grouping of bioluminescent flora and fauna intertwined with sleek architectural elements. The mood is magical and mysterious. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, glowing teal, and accents of warm gold/orange for contrast. The style should be high-contrast graphic novel illustration meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetic. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and intricate linework. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, designed for seamless repeat printability on apparel. Crisp, vector-like quality, minimal shading, maximum visual pop. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, 4k, rule of thirds applied to the overall composition
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, grain, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, amateur, cartoon, photo-realistic, gradient, jpeg artifacts
